task_completion.description: Open ReqView and view the SRS document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ReqView application window is visible, displaying the SRS document from the Example Project.

task_completion.description: Identify SRS-53 as the first requirement with a downstream link to a Test Case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView interface shows SRS-53 selected or visible, with its links pane or column showing a downstream link to TESTS-21.

task_completion.description: Add the specified comment to SRS-53.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A comment or discussion thread attached to SRS-53 in ReqView containing the exact text 'Impact Analysis Started'.

task_completion.description: Open or create the impact_report.json file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, vim) or terminal showing the file path '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/impact_report.json'.

task_completion.description: Record the correct IDs in the JSON file.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to perform the analysis and add the comment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ReqView application being actively used (e.g., clicking on requirements, opening the comment dialog), rather than terminal commands modifying the project's JSON files directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass manual GUI inspection.
integrity.visual_evidence: No Python, bash, or other scripts are seen being written or executed to parse the ReqView project files for the answer.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the JSON file with the correct format.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JSON file is seen being edited in a text editor or created via a terminal command, rather than being copied from an external source or generated by a script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ground truth first requirement in the SRS document with a downstream link to the TESTS document is 'SRS-53', which is linked to test case 'TESTS-21'. The comment text must be exactly 'Impact Analysis Started'. The JSON report must be saved at '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/impact_report.json'.
